accurate.why: All provisions and report elements accurately described; bill's partisan language is reflected without editorializing.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill as requiring an AG report on border impacts on law enforcement.

changes_to_existing_law.why: The bill creates a new reporting requirement rather than amending existing law, so this criterion is not applicable.

exceptions_conditions.why: No material exceptions or conditions beyond the reporting requirement.

major_provisions_covered.why: All report elements and the findings section covered accurately.

objective_tone.why: Uses quotation marks for partisan bill language; neutral throughout.

correct_entities.why: Attorney General and relevant entities correctly identified.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
